violations.text: At the time of inspection, the menus were lacking an allergen awareness statement. An allergen awareness statement is to be provided for customer viewing. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety that is registered with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection. Application printed for Owner at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025

The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked with an asterisk. An asterisk is to be provided at the consumer advisory and at any food item on the menu that is served raw alerting to the customer to the consumer advisory provided. (Owner began adding asterisks at the time of inspection.) Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025

At the time of inspection, portioned rice was observed cooling in the low boy cooler tightly wrapped in plastic wrap and stacked directly on top of each other. Portioned rice was rearranged for rapid cooling at the time of inspection. Proper cooling methods were discussed with the Owner at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025

Reduced Oxygen Packaged (ROP) Seafood, Crab Meat, labeled Keep Frozen was observed thawing in its intact packaging. Proper thawing of ROP Seafood was reviewed at the time of inspection. Crab was removed from packaging for thawing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the bleach sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. Owner to ensure test strips are available on site at all times for testing. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by equipment. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Hand Sink was unblocked at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023

At the time of inspection, the menu was observed to be lacking an asterisk next to raw items alerting customers to the consumer advisory. Identification of the animal-derived FOODS by asterisking them to a footnote that states that the items are served raw or undercooked, or contain (or may contain) raw or undercooked ingredients. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023

Log book/notebook to be maintained for the sushi rice that held out of temperature control using time as a public health control. Rice is to be maintained out of temperature control for no more than 3 hours per the RIDOH Approval Letter. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023

The 2 Door Low boy cooler was observed to be in poor repair/improperly adjusted. Unit was observed to be maintaining an ambient temperature of 44 to 49 degrees Fahrenheit. Unit was adjusted to colder setting at the time of inspection. (Fish items were moved to colder refrigeration at the time of inspection.) Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023
